title: Amtech L1965 38 Piece Stubby Ratchet Screwdriver and bit Set
features: EASY TO USE: This handy set features a stubby ratchet screwdriver with a comfortable grip and forward, reverse and lock functions for ease of use
VERSATILE: It includes a useful assortment of 25mm chrome vanadium steel Torx, square, Pozi, Phillips, slotted and hex bits
CARRY CASE: The set is supplied in a handy plastic storage case
MULTI-DRIVE: Compatible with 1/4" and other common drive sizes
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
